title: Ollama service exempt from spec 042 compose contract enforcement

scenarios.title: requiredOllamaPrefix constant declared with fail-loud SST form
scenarios.given: internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go has a const block declaring required service-prefix constants
scenarios.when: the source file is parsed by the Go compiler
scenarios.then: a `requiredOllamaPrefix` constant exists with value `${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:?HOST_BIND_ADDRESS must be set by deploy adapter}:${OLLAMA_HOST_PORT}:` matching the live deploy/compose.deploy.yml line 243 form character-for-character
scenarios.specSource: internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go const block (pre-fix had no requiredOllamaPrefix declaration; only requiredCorePrefix, requiredMLPrefix, requiredPrometheusPrefix existed)
scenarios.adversarial: TestComposeContract_AdversarialOllamaLiteralBind (proves the constant is ENFORCED, not just declared)

scenarios.title: assertComposeContract rejects ollama with literal 127.0.0.1: prefix (spec 020 form)
scenarios.when: assertComposeContract is called with the fixture
scenarios.then: it returns a non-nil error mentioning `ollama` AND `BUG-042-003` AND the literal violating prefix
scenarios.specSource: internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go assertComposeContract function (pre-fix had no ollama enforcement branch)
scenarios.adversarial: YES — fails RED if the ollama enforcement block is removed from assertComposeContract

scenarios.title: assertComposeContract rejects ollama with default-fallback `${HOST_BIND_ADDRESS:-127.0.0.1}:` form (Gate G028 violation)
scenarios.when: assertComposeContract is called with the fixture
scenarios.then: it returns a non-nil error mentioning `ollama` AND `BUG-042-003` AND the literal violating prefix; the `:?` (fail-loud) substitution form is the ONLY accepted form per Gate G028
scenarios.specSource: internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go assertComposeContract function (pre-fix had no Gate G028 default-fallback rejection for ollama)
scenarios.adversarial: YES — fails RED if the ollama enforcement block is removed from assertComposeContract

scenarios.title: assertComposeContract rejects ollama.network_mode=host (Pattern P5 bypass)
scenarios.given: a compose fixture where ollama declares `network_mode: host`
scenarios.when: assertComposeContract is called with the fixture
scenarios.then: it returns a non-nil error mentioning `ollama` AND `network_mode` AND either `BUG-042-002` or `BUG-042-003` attribution
scenarios.specSource: internal/deploy/compose_contract_test.go TestComposeContract_AdversarialNetworkModeHostBypass table-driven sweep (pre-fix had only 4 sub-cases for core/ml/postgres/nats; ollama was missing)
scenarios.adversarial: YES — fails RED if the ollama network_mode check is removed from assertComposeContract

scenarios.title: TestComposeContract_LiveFile preserved — live deploy/compose.deploy.yml satisfies the extended contract
scenarios.when: TestComposeContract_LiveFile reads the file and calls assertComposeContract
scenarios.then: the function returns nil and the test PASSES — confirming the live file already complies with the new ollama enforcement (the fix locks compliance against future regression, it does not require the live file to change)
scenarios.specSource: deploy/compose.deploy.yml (live file at HEAD already complies with the extended contract; the additive ollama enforcement does not require any live-file change)
scenarios.adversarial: NO (positive canary — proves the additive change does not break the existing baseline)
